zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Meißen於1264年之前出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯時，她的父親Albrecht II. der Entartete von Thüringen-Meißen23歲，母親Margaretha von Staufen26歲。她於1282年1月與Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1332年9月在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 盧包格盧包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Meißen于1264年之前出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯时，她的父亲Albrecht II. der Entartete von Thüringen-Meißen23岁，母亲Margaretha von Staufen26岁。她于1282年1月与Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1332年9月在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 盧包格盧包格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Meißen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dieter, Ernst.
North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Mein   1.

variants.name: Mein
meanings: German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Maino, Meino, a short form of various compound names with the first element magin ‘strength, might’, for example Meinhardt . Compare Main 7.
German: nickname from Middle High German mein ‘mean, nasty’.

Scottish and English: perhaps a variant of Main or Meen. Meen is either a nickname from Middle English mene ‘inferior, lowly; poor; unpleasant’, from the Middle English personal name Mene (which is of uncertain origin). Alternatively, it could conceivably be a habitational name from East and West Meon (Hampshire), which take their names from the river Meon (of unexplained etymology).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Meißen was born before 1264, in Meißen, Saxony, Germany, her father, Albrecht II. der Entartete von Thüringen-Meißen, was 23 and her mother, Margaretha von Staufen, was 26. She married Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen in January 1282. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 10 daughters. She died in September 1332, in Lüneburg, Lüneburg, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Meißen est née avant 1264, à Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Albrecht II. der Entartete von Thüringen-Meißen, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaretha von Staufen, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen en janvier 1282. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1332, à Lüneburg, Landkreis Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Meißen vor 1264 in Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albrecht II. der Entartete von Thüringen-Meißen 23 und ihre Mutter Margaretha von Staufen 26. Sie hat im Januar 1282 Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 10 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Meißen è nata il prima del 1264 nel Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Albrecht II. der Entartete von Thüringen-Meißen, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Margaretha von Staufen, aveva 26 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Agnes von Meißenが1264年以前にドイツサチセンクレイス メイssンで生まれた時，父Albrecht II. der Entartete von Thüringen-Meißenは23歳，母Margaretha von Staufenは26歳であった。1282年1月にHeinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1332年9月にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス ルuネブルグルuネブルグで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Meißen(이)가 1264년 이전 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albrecht II. der Entartete von Thüringen-Meißen(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaretha von Staufen(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1282년 1월 Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1332년 9월 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 u니버그 u니버그에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Meißen родилась перед 1264 г. в местности крис миssен, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Albrecht II. der Entartete von Thüringen-Meißen было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaretha von Staufen, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen январь 1282 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла сентябрь 1332 г. в местности лuнебург, ландкрис лuнебург, ниедирсачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes von Meißen nació antes de 1264, en Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Albrecht II. der Entartete von Thüringen-Meißen, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaretha von Staufen, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen en enero de 1282. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1332, en Lüneburg, Landkreis Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania.
